user_prompt: Offer prayer for transuranic arquebus a charging
prayer:
Approach the transuranic arquebus with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Rite of Charging upon its rad-phial conduits, beseeching the Machine Spirit to awaken its furious energies.
Anoint the transuranic arquebus's power inductors with sanctified unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Capacitance.
Monitor the charging flux through auspex scans, affirming the transuranic arquebus's spirit aligns with the Motive Force.
Conclude by sealing the vaults with binaric praise, ensuring the transuranic arquebus stands primed for the Emperor's wrath.

Kneel before the panopticon array, intoning the Litany of Vigilance to rouse its Machine Spirit.

Verify activation through noospheric diagnostics, as the panopticon awakens to pierce the veil of ignorance.
Seal the rite with electro-incense, binding the panopticon's gaze eternally to the Machine God's will.
